textByHash.e16d1765b62bec4d97b473d62797a81bc493608b: Why I'd be happy to have a chat! I do enjoy talking about this great house of ours.
textByHash.65308a4e5fd214669b197d5364edb31d2d7ce611: The Lovakengj house is filled with incredibly skilled blacksmiths. Lead by Vulcana Lovakengj, her incredible leadership and intelligent material saving skills pave the way for future blacksmiths.
textByHash.2828a6f4af0f53afb6d93c1b74ee753d4d5d5436: Armours, weaponry, tools and structures - our house supplies Kourend with all of these to the finest standards known to Dwarf and Human alike.
textByHash.fa08208e03112b8114793ad336862462e808a525: Those seeking favour within our household start with a dirty job.
textByHash.c3f6b49e16f19b2cbfda02b8addbc5b8a9bc40ed: Creating dynamite and mining in the sulphur mine isn't a pretty job, but someone has to do it!
textByHash.e545a9df42f9b9081a6219e3a583b9992b481521: Those who endure our daunting introductory tasks are rewarded greatly - being taught to create the armour worn by the very soldiers of the Shayzien army, along with access to our Blast Mine - the rewards able to be
textByHash.97383b1129abd95ef568c6124446e154238526dc: reaped by the most loyal of our house are nothing to be scoffed at!
textByHash.ffaab1f84aa913769d6eee6cecb2c8469ac04160: Why I'd be happy to have a chat! I do enjoy talking about this great city of ours.
textByHash.24f1c047776e73a8c1b02e968f54c74c393876e2: Very well, I look forward to chatting with you!
textByHash.3551d003d2a9b065142c4808b2ca94dfb8145fc5: Lovakengj is filled with incredibly skilled blacksmiths. Under the leadership of Vulcana Lovakengj, our intelligent material saving skills make us the finest blacksmiths in the land.
textByHash.1af0a000eb4862af6c61e3e145e46dcca1caa821: Armours, weaponry, tools and structures - our city supplies Kourend with all of these to the finest standards known to Dwarf and Human alike.
textByHash.7ac90d8e701e966543762232697f58334f3d8181: Well creating dynamite and mining in the sulphur mine isn't a pretty job, but someone has to do it!
textByHash.675ad99b87652e7683e2773fb2af25e13f834898: We also make the armour worn by the very soldiers of the Shayzien Army here, not to mention the Blast Mine.
textByHash.602e98149bf2c913493c3d77d0dde92611577f50: The rewards able to be reaped in our city are nothing to be scoffed at!
textByHash.867f09875480abb9a97f43fdf575e7ef7c7e2d49: Why, it's my little shop. I supply all kinds of items that the Lovakengj workers need. Though if you need pickaxes, you should visit Toothy in the sulphur mine.
textByHash.93ed17d17d2c1945d73e8b479f717a3e5094a311: Now, can I help you today?
